---
title: "Link"
generated: true
description: "A link function as a record of its three IRLS primitives."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.glm`](../nitrix-stats-glm.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.stats._family`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:Link -->
```python
class Link
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:Link -->
A link function as a record of its three IRLS primitives.

`link` = `g(mu)`, `linkinv` = `g^{-1}(eta)`, `mu_eta` = `d mu /
d eta` (as a function of `eta`); `eta_bound` is the IRLS linear-predictor
clamp (`inf` unless the inverse link can overflow).  Compose onto a
distribution with `Family.with_link`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:Link.__init__ -->
```python
__init__(name: str, link: Callable[[Array], Array], linkinv: Callable[[Array], Array], mu_eta: Callable[[Array], Array], eta_bound: float = float('inf')) -> None
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
